prose:
**Ferrocene Fukui-reactivity result** — Property: condensed Fukui indices from Mulliken partial charges. Level of theory/method: **GFN2-xTB** (`--method xtb`, semi-empirical tight-binding) using the xTB backend. Geometry: user-supplied fixed input geometry at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/ferrocene/ferrocene.xyz`; no geometry optimization was reported by this task. Environment: **gas phase** (no `--solvent` supplied, per the skill help). Charge/multiplicity: parent charge **0**, multiplicity **1**; derived cation state charge **+1**, multiplicity **2**; derived anion state charge **−1**, multiplicity **2**. Atom count: **21**. Partial-charge scheme: **Mulliken (GFN2-xTB)**. Program: **xtb** (version not reported by the tool).

Headline result: the **most electrophilic site** is **Fe, atom 11**, with **f+ = 0.22885456**. The **most nucleophilic site** is also **Fe, atom 11**, with **f− = 0.25938191**. The corresponding neutral Fukui index at Fe is **f0 = 0.24411824**, and the dual descriptor at Fe is **−0.030527354**.

No `warnings` array was returned by the tool result. Integrity verdict returned by chemkit: **trustworthy = true**. The tool also returned these integrity check details verbatim: `sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)`; `sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)`; `common header present`.

Reproducibility: chemkit returned this CLI invocation: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method xtb --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/ferrocene/ferrocene.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpyjv_l697/live.json`. Plot path returned: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/ferrocene/argo_gpt-5.5/20260704-182051_ferrocene_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`. A live `.out` log path was not included in the chemkit tool result I received, so I cannot truthfully report one.
